reason: This configuration aims to maximize performance by addressing the three most critical dataset challenges. We retain `weighted_bce` to mitigate the severe taxonomic imbalance (Finding 1) and the class long-tail (Finding 2), which disproportionately lowers the macro AUC. We use `mixup` to synthesize multi-label examples, directly simulating the high density of simultaneous species found in the test soundscapes (Finding 4). Finally, setting the geographic scale to 200 km aggressively weights the training data toward the Pantanal wetlands, mitigating the significant geographic domain shift (Finding 5) observed between the global training set and the local test set.
